findings.title: Missing regression coverage for newline-terminated CLI errors
findings.impact: This PR fixes the observable stderr contract for hashring_parser error paths, but no test would fail if the std::endl additions were removed again. The open-file, parse, encode, and exception diagnostics could regress back to concatenating with the next message or shell prompt without CI catching it.
findings.fix: Add a focused test for the hashring_parser helper binary that invokes at least one failing path such as a missing input file and asserts stderr ends with a newline; include representative parse/encode failure coverage if the harness can construct invalid inputs cheaply.
